name: Cherry Walnut Divinity
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, syrup, salt, and water in a saucepan. Boil until it reaches the firm ball stage (248°F).
2. Slowly pour the boiling mixture into stiffly beaten egg whites while continuously beating.
3. Beat until the candy begins to thicken.
4. Add candied cherries, vanilla extract, and chopped walnuts.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper or pour it into a well-buttered pan.
6. Allow to cool completely.
7. Cut into squares.
